name: Terran Service Bayonet [T]
description: The standard Terran infantry bayonet â€” a thirty-centimeter single-edged blade designed to mount on a rifle but equally functional as a standalone weapon. Stamped from high-carbon steel at the Foundry in batches of ten thousand. No individual identity: no maker's mark, no serial number, identical to the nine thousand, nine hundred and ninety-nine made before it. Soldiers name them anyway.
